Quick answer

Exarchia is best for Budget travelers, Students, Alternative culture.

Exarchia is a bohemian & budget area with 3 tracked hotels averaging about €70/night. In this dataset, 0 hotels show an Acropolis-view signal and 1 hotel show a rooftop-bar signal. The lowest tracked nightly price signal is €40 at City Circus Athens.

Compare hotels Booking notes FAQs

About Exarchia

Athens' anarchist and student quarter. Cheap eats, vinyl shops, and alternative culture. Not for everyone, but full of character.

AlternativeBudgetBohemian
Best for: Budget travelers, Students, Alternative culture

What to Know Before Booking in Exarchia

Best-fit traveler

Exarchia works especially well for budget travelers, students, alternative culture. If that is not your trip style, compare nearby alternatives before booking.

Price signal

The tracked Exarchia hotels average about €70 per night, with actual rates changing by date, room type, and cancellation policy.

Location signal

Exarchia is listed as 20 min from the Acropolis in this dataset. Confirm the exact hotel address and transit route before booking.

FAQs: Staying in Exarchia

Is Exarchia a good area to stay in Athens?

Yes. Exarchia is athens' anarchist and student quarter. It is especially useful for budget travelers, students, alternative culture.

How far is Exarchia from the Acropolis?

Exarchia is 20 min walk from the Acropolis. Exarchia is listed as 20 min from the Acropolis in the Hotels of Athens neighborhood data. Exact walking time depends on the individual hotel address and entrance used.

What's the average hotel price in Exarchia?

Hotels in Exarchia average around €70 per night. Tracked hotels in Exarchia average around €70 per night, with the visible dataset spanning 3 options. Confirm live rates before booking.
